context.label: Yuji vessel state through Death Painting

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline opening through Death Painting aftermath.

content.fact: Yuji Itadori becomes Sukuna's vessel after consuming a Sukuna finger, making his body and survival a jujutsu society crisis.
content.injection: In early mainline scenes after the finger incident, treat Yuji as Sukuna's vessel and a dangerous special case, not as an ordinary new student.
constraints: Use later decks for host-state changes beyond this early window.
antiLore: Do not leak later Sukuna vessel developments into early-origin scenes.

sourceInfo.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Execution Is Suspended For Finger Collection

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline opening through Death Painting aftermath.

content.fact: Yuji's execution is delayed because jujutsu authorities use him as a vessel capable of consuming Sukuna's fingers before the sentence is carried out.
content.injection: During early mainline scenes, frame Yuji's school life and missions under a suspended execution sentence, not as ordinary enrollment.
constraints: Most civilians and many uninvolved people should not know the full sentence mechanics.
antiLore: Do not write Yuji's situation as legally or emotionally safe.

sourceInfo.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Tokyo First-Years Form The Early Core

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline opening through Death Painting aftermath.

content.fact: The early mainline Tokyo first-year core is Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Nobara Kugisaki under Tokyo Jujutsu High mission pressure.
content.injection: For early mainline school scenes, use Yuji, Megumi, and Nobara as the central first-year dynamic and let trust develop through dangerous missions.
constraints: Do not import later expanded team dynamics as if they are already settled.
antiLore: Do not replace the early trio with later-arc rosters.

sourceInfo.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline opening through Death Painting aftermath.

content.fact: Early Yuji scenes treat Sukuna control as a volatile risk, with Sukuna's appearances carrying immediate danger and consequences.
content.injection: When Sukuna surfaces in early-origin Context, write it as an emergency-level threat rather than a controlled partner dynamic.
constraints: Later vessel-state rules belong in later decks.
antiLore: Do not write Yuji and Sukuna as cooperative by default in this early window.

sourceInfo.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
sourceInfo.chapterRange: Early mainline setup through detention center
